'''Vog Salvage, Inc.''' was a small salvaging company that was owned and operated by [[Belinda Vog]]. The company reached the height of its success during the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. Vog Salvage was one of the many salvaging companies that tried to reap a profit by sifting through the destroyed remains of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]

==Appearances==
*''[[Graveyard of Alderaan]]'' {{Reprint|Graveyard of Alderaan}}
